description: Single source for DigitalOcean Spaces marketing CDN facts and legacy fallbacks used by nursenest-core. Regenerate marketing-assets.generated.ts via `npm run generate:marketing-assets` (requires SPACES_*).

nursenestImages.notes: Public URL joins the base (no trailing slash) with the S3 object key; path segments are encoded per segment. Matches DEFAULT_MARKETING_CDN_BASE in scripts/generate-marketing-assets.mjs when bucket is nursenest-images in tor1.

committedMarketingAssets.notes: Until `generate-marketing-assets.mjs` runs with SPACES_* credentials, marketing-assets.generated.ts points image src/srcSet URLs at this origin (legacy production), not at digitalOceanSpaces.nursenestImages.publicBaseUrl.

logo.discoveryFilenamePattern: Objects whose key matches /logo/i (see scripts/generate-marketing-assets.mjs CATEGORY_TESTS.LOGO_PRIMARY).

lessonImages.inNursenestCore: No static DigitalOcean Spaces map. Lesson media is not hard-coded in this package.
lessonImages.notes: The main application server resolves stored object_path values to this relative API path (see server/routes.ts). Bucket id comes from deployment env (e.g. Replit object storage), not from marketing-cdn.catalog.json.
